messages.content: Math mode: Return a single numeric value only. No words, symbols other than minus sign or decimal point, no units, no explanation, no pleasantries, and no sign-offs.
What is the median of the data set 7, 2, 9, 4, 4, 11?
Now compute (3^5 + 2^7) / 11 and return just the number with no commentary, no encouragements, and no closing remarks
